body:
## Wave 1 — CEO Memory

### What changed

| File | Purpose |
|------|---------|
| `CLAUDE.md` | Master operating manual — every future Claude Code session reads this first. Covers PR discipline, forbidden actions, daily commands, wave roadmap, approval gates, key file locations. |
| `docs/CEO_OPERATING_CONTEXT.md` | CEO daily rhythm, sales motion, revenue targets, escalation gates, session startup rules. |
| `docs/DEALIX_BUSINESS_MODEL.md` | Full offer ladder (499 SAR → 100K+ SAR), unit economics, GTM strategy, competitive position, PDPL stance. |
| `docs/DEALIX_SAFE_EXECUTION_RULES.md` | Hard stops (forbidden actions), script safety rules, GitHub Actions rules, data handling rules, wave execution checklist. |

### Validation output

```
Python 3.11.15
bash syntax: OK
OK CEO report: company/reports/2026-06-10_MICRO_MASTER_CEO_REPORT.md
OK Approval queue: company/outbox/2026-06-10_micro_master_approval_queue.csv
OK CRM: company/crm/pipeline.csv
=== VALIDATION PASS ===
```

### What was NOT done (intentional)
- No Docker
- No npm build
- No new scripts
- No auto-send
- No generated files committed

### Next step after merge
Wave 2: `feat/revenue-engine-v2` — daily commercial pack generation.
Do NOT start Wave 2 before this PR is merged to main.


---
_Generated by [Claude Code](https://claude.ai/code/session_013o5KPdEBiqfZBRLbePom3Z)_

commits.messageBody:
Wave 1 — CEO Memory. Creates project-level operating instructions so every
future Claude Code session understands Dealix positioning, safe execution rules,
daily commands, business model, sales offers, approval gates, and PR discipline.

Files added:
- CLAUDE.md: master operating manual for Claude Code sessions
- docs/CEO_OPERATING_CONTEXT.md: daily rhythm, sales motion, revenue targets
- docs/DEALIX_BUSINESS_MODEL.md: offer ladder, unit economics, GTM strategy
- docs/DEALIX_SAFE_EXECUTION_RULES.md: hard stops, script safety, data handling

Validation: python 3.11 OK, bash -n OK, micro_master.py OK

https://claude.ai/code/session_013o5KPdEBiqfZBRLbePom3Z
commits.messageHeadline: feat(wave-1): add CEO operating context and CLAUDE.md memory

commits.messageBody:
Patterns for *_micro_master_approval_queue.csv and *_MICRO_MASTER_CEO_REPORT.md
were missing; existing rules only covered the master_stable variants.

title: feat(wave-1): CEO Operating Context + CLAUDE.md memory
